title: RapidMeta Oncology | Tarlatamab in Pretreated Small-Cell Lung Cancer v1.0
hero_h2: Tarlatamab (DLL3 BiTE) in Pretreated Small-Cell Lung Cancer

pico.pop: Adults with relapsed or refractory small-cell lung cancer after >=1 prior platinum-based regimen
pico.int: Tarlatamab IV Q2W (DLL3 / CD3 bispecific T-cell engager); registrational doses 10 mg and 100 mg with step-up
pico.out: Confirmed objective response rate by independent review (primary); duration of response, OS, PFS
pico.subgroup: Prior lines (1 vs >=2), prior PD-(L)1 exposure, brain metastases at baseline

real_data_entries.name: DeLLphi-301
real_data_entries.group: Pretreated SCLC, tarlatamab 10 mg IV Q2W (registrational arm; ORR primary, single-arm)

allOutcomes.title: Confirmed objective response rate by IRC, tarlatamab 10 mg arm (single-arm proportion)
Confirmed objective response rate by IRC, tarlatamab 100 mg arm (single-arm proportion)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Ahn MJ et al. N Engl J Med 2023;389:2063-2075 (DeLLphi-301).
